scripts.build:android: vite build && npx cap copy && npx cap open android
scripts.build:apk: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo 'APK gerado em: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
scripts.build:apk:release: vite build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && echo 'APK gerado em: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk'
